description: Lab research nodes: unlock rules (AND) use hunter DB level/XP + unified points. first_research_points awarded once per id (tracked in lab_chapter2_bonus_awarded). research_cooldown_sec: after you clear a researched node, re-research is blocked until the timer elapses. Policy — 3600s (1h): lightweight / always-on tools; 10800s (3h): gated or cross-system nodes and Chapter III exploration rails; 36000s (10h): economy/rules/meta caps (prism, rulebook, foundry key/core, rule fold).
